subcodes.first_line: O my God! This leaf from among the leaves of Thy earth hath sought the Tree of Thy divine Unity, and the breezes of Thy days have taken hold of it [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا الهی ان ورقه من اوراق ارضک ارادت سدره فردانیتک و اخذتها نفحات ایامک علی
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
